title: How to reset your portal password
snippet: Go to the login page, click 'Forgot Password', enter your registered email, and follow the link sent to your inbox. If you don't receive the email within 5 minutes, check your spam folder or contact support.

title: Understanding invoice rejection reasons
snippet: Invoices may be rejected for: price mismatch (contract vs invoiced price), quantity mismatch (ordered vs invoiced), missing GRN, duplicate invoice, or tax calculation errors. Check your rejection email for the specific reason code.

title: How to upload documents to the portal
snippet: Navigate to the relevant PO or invoice, click 'Attach Document', select your file (PDF, Excel, or image, max 10MB), and click Upload. Supported formats: PDF, XLSX, PNG, JPG.

title: User roles and permissions
snippet: Admin: full access including user management. Finance: invoices, payments, reports. Viewer: read-only access to POs and invoices. Only Admin users can create or modify other users.

title: How to generate reports
snippet: Go to Reports > New Report, select the report type (PO Summary, Invoice Status, Payment History), choose date range and format (PDF/Excel), then click Generate. Reports are available for download within 30 seconds.

title: MFA setup and troubleshooting
snippet: To set up MFA: Settings > Security > Enable MFA. Use an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator). If locked out after failed attempts, contact support to unlock your account.

title: Payment terms and schedules
snippet: Standard payment terms are Net-30 from invoice approval date. Early payment discounts may apply per your contract. Payment runs execute every Tuesday and Friday.

title: How to dispute an invoice decision
snippet: If you disagree with an invoice rejection, click 'Dispute' on the invoice detail page, provide supporting evidence, and submit. Disputes are reviewed within 3 business days.
